item.title: Southeast Toyota Distributors, LLC: EQUIPMENT:OTHER:LABELS Recall (2024 toyota tundra)
item.summary: Southeast Toyota Distributors, LLC (SET) is recalling certain 2022-2024 Toyota Tundra vehicles. The load carrying capacity modification label states the incorrect load carrying capacity, which can result in an overloaded vehicle. As such, these vehicles fail to comply with the requirements of Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standard number 110, "Tire Selection and Rims."
item.affectedPeople: An overloaded vehicle increases the risk of a crash.
item.remedy: SET will mail a new modified label, free of charge. Owner notification letters were mailed December 18, 2023. Owners may contact SET's customer service at 1-866-405-4226. SET's number for this recall is SET23B.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
